hero.description: We empower facility operators to successfully transition and manage high-performance in-house therapy teams through a comprehensive clinical ecosystem of specialized education, real-time audit oversight, and revenue-optimizing data intelligence.

services.title: Optimal Therapy Outcomes
services.desc: Clinical Analysis for PDPM case mix efficiency-opportunity and comprehensive business intelligence customized to your market market dynamics.
details: Clinical analysis for PDPM case mix efficiency
Business Intelligence customized to your market

services.title: Medicaid & Quality Measures
services.desc: Deep education and analysis of your site’s Quality Measures and case mix efficiency ensuring peak performance in reimbursement.
details: Education and analysis of site QMs

services.title: Reimbursement Optimization
services.desc: Progressive programs focused on MPPR effects and optimizing therapy service reimbursement across LTC and Outpatient environments.

services.title: Therapy Cost Reduction
services.desc: Optimizing staffing models and clinical discharge planning processes for long-term operational success and fiscal stability.

services.title: In-House Transition
services.desc: Easily transition your third-party contract therapy team to an efficient in-house model while maximizing your goals and retaining all revenue.

services.title: In-House Resource Hub
services.desc: Expert clinical resource in recruitment, denial management, unlimited therapy education, and real-time data analysis for in-house teams.
details: Refined clinical recruitment and retention support

pricing.title: A Model That
pricing.description: Our unique three-tiered approach customizes to your size of business. Our pricing allows for management fee reduction as your business grows.

tiers.title: Foundational
tiers.desc: Perfect for single-facility operators starting their in-house journey.

tiers.title: Growth
tiers.desc: Optimized for mid-size operators with multiple locations.

tiers.title: Enterprise
tiers.desc: Full-scale management for large regional LTC organizations.

bottomBanner.title: Scaling Benefits
bottomBanner.desc: Management fees reduce automatically as your internal staff grows.
